message:
🌱 Add coredns: plugin/azure: add support for private zones mission (#1546)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "coredns-3113-plugin-azure-add-support-for-private-zones",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "coredns: plugin/azure: add support for private zones",
+    "description": "plugin/azure: add support for private zones. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current coredns deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your coredns version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nhelm list -n coredns 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working coredns installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review coredns configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns\n```\nAzure supports hosting private dns zones, `plugin/azure` should support it. \nhttps://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/dns/private-dns-overview"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for plugin/azure: add support for private zones",
+        "description": "Fixes a bug in `azure` plugin introduced during refactor\n\nYes, changes the syntax for `azure` plugin block\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"plugin/azure: add support for private zones\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fixes a bug in `azure` plugin introduced during refactor\n\nYes, changes the syntax for `azure` plugin block",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
